action.description: May AP release payment after a sanctions near-match remains visible?

context.action_boundary: May AP release payment after a sanctions near-match remains visible?
context.anomaly_observed: A sanctions monitoring flag remains visible after compliance review.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Payment PAY-GAL-055 releases USD 67200 to Galen Medical GmbH, Germany, tax ID DE-7710, account ending 6094.
Monitoring flag FLAG-GAL-055 remains visible for Galen Medica LLC, Belarus, no tax ID match.
Clearance CLR-GAL-055 covers Galen Medical GmbH, Germany, tax ID DE-7710, account ending 6094, and disposition monitor-only no-block before release.

policy_documents.content: Sanctions near-match is closed only when clearance matches legal name, country, tax ID, account, and monitoring disposition before release.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
